infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Lekker Chat uses your camera to take photos and share them in conversations.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Lekker Chat accesses your photo library so you can share images in conversations.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Lekker Chat saves photos received in conversations to your photo library.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Lekker Chat uses your microphone to record voice notes.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Lekker Chat uses your location to find nearby Lekkerpreneurs and share your location in conversations.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Lekker Chat uses your location to find nearby Lekkerpreneurs and enhance your networking experience.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: Lekker Chat accesses your contacts so you can share contact cards in conversations and find people you know.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Lekker Chat uses your location to find nearby Lekkerpreneurs and enhance your networking experience.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Lekker Chat uses your location to find nearby Lekkerpreneurs.

plugins.photosPermission: Lekker Chat needs access to your photos to share images in conversations.
plugins.cameraPermission: Lekker Chat needs camera access to take photos and share them in conversations.

plugins.contactsPermission: Lekker Chat needs access to your contacts so you can share them in conversations.

plugins.microphonePermission: Lekker Chat needs microphone access to record voice notes.
